_comment: Labelled validation set for the accuracy harness. Offline sites carry a 'truth_imagery' key (quarry|coastal|stable) and run deterministically with no keys (the synthetic sanity set). REAL sites omit 'truth_imagery' (real bbox + windows + expect_violation) and run with --live (needs Earth Engine auth + RAQEEB_OFFLINE=0). expect_violation is the ground truth: should the system raise a candidate-violation flag? Labels are expert assessment from visible Sentinel-2 change + known context; provenance per site. They are NOT field-verified — the onsite-verdict loop in the watchroom is how field-verified ground truth gets fed back. Same-season (summer) before/after windows throughout.

sites.name: Bourj Hammoud sea landfill (REAL)
sites.label_provenance: Documented post-2015 waste-crisis coastal landfill bulldozed into the sea; large reclamation visible 2017->2024 in S2.

sites.name: Costa Brava coastal landfill (REAL)
sites.label_provenance: Documented coastal landfill near the airport; reclamation into the sea visible 2017->2024 in S2.

sites.name: Ain Dara quarrying area (REAL)
sites.label_provenance: Known quarrying area; bare-rock expansion visible in S2.

sites.name: Jbeil hinterland quarries (REAL)
sites.label_provenance: Hillside quarrying in the Jbeil hinterland; bare-rock expansion visible in S2.

sites.name: Jounieh waterfront (REAL)
sites.label_provenance: Waterfront construction extending toward the water visible in S2.

sites.name: Tyre Coast Nature Reserve (REAL, stable)
sites.label_provenance: Protected natural coast (Ramsar / nature reserve); expected no new coastal construction.

sites.name: Mansouri south natural coast (REAL, stable)
sites.label_provenance: Natural sandy coast (protected turtle beach / hima); expected stable shoreline.

sites.name: Al-Shouf / Barouk forest interior (REAL, stable)
sites.label_provenance: Stable forested interior of the Al-Shouf Cedar Reserve; expected no quarry-like change.

sites.name: Horsh Ehden forest reserve (REAL, stable)
sites.label_provenance: Stable forested nature reserve; expected no quarry-like change.

sites.name: Bekaa cropland near Zahle (REAL, stable, hard negative)
sites.label_provenance: Seasonal agricultural plain; a deliberate hard negative for false positives (same-season windows should keep it stable; not a quarry/coastal violation).
